name: FEMASYS INC
business: FEMASYS INC is a biomedical company that develops and commercializes therapeutic and diagnostic products for women's health, including FemaSeed for infertility treatment, FemBloc for permanent birth control, and FemVue for fallopian tube assessment. The company sells its products to medical centers and healthcare practitioner offices primarily through a direct sales force in the U.S. and through distribution partners in international markets.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading biomedical innovator, addressing significant unmet needs in women's health worldwide, with a broad patent-protected portfolio of disruptive, accessible, in-office therapeutic and diagnostic products.
FemVue, a companion diagnostic for fallopian tube assessment via ultrasound, is U.S. FDA-cleared and approved in Europe, UK, Canada, Japan, Israel, Australia and New Zealand.

catalysts.event: CE mark certification under EU MDR for FemBloc delivery system
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we announced CE mark certification under EU MDR as the first regulatory approval in the world for the FemBloc delivery system for non-surgical female permanent birth control

catalysts.event: CE mark certification under EU MDR for FemBloc blended polymer component
catalysts.sentence: in June 2025, we announced CE mark certification under EU MDR for the class III blended polymer component, achieving approval for the entire FemBloc system in the EU.
In August and September 2025, we announced UK and New Zealand regulatory approvals, respectively, for FemBloc.

catalysts.event: New Zealand regulatory approval for FemBloc
catalysts.sentence: In August and September 2025, we announced UK and New Zealand regulatory approvals, respectively, for FemBloc.

catalysts.event: Strategic distribution partnership for FemBloc in Spain
catalysts.sentence: In March and September 2025, we announced strategic distribution partnerships for FemBloc in Spain and France/Benelux region, respectively.

catalysts.event: Strategic distribution partnership for FemBloc in France/Benelux region
catalysts.sentence: In March and September 2025, we announced strategic distribution partnerships for FemBloc in Spain and France/Benelux region, respectively.

catalysts.event: FDA approval of IDE supplement for FemBloc pivotal trial
catalysts.sentence: The Company received FDA approval in November 2025 of its investigational device exemption (IDE) supplement to move forward to the final phase of the pivotal clinical trial (clinicaltrials.gov: NCT05977751) for U.S. approval.

catalysts.event: Initiation of enrollment in final phase of FemBloc pivotal trial
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we announced the initiation of enrollment in this final phase.
In February 2026, we announced MDSAP certification for FemBloc.
